posts.angle: AI adoption creates more recurring subscriptions that need a reliable payment layer
posts.copy: AI tool adoption keeps growing. As enterprises like Hyatt scale AI usage, managing recurring seats becomes a core operational task. RichXPay simplifies this with virtual cards funded by USDT/USDC.
sourceTitles: OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
posts.landingSummary: Subscription payment page focused on recurring billing stability and virtual-card management.
